calendar.matters:
Petitioners Christopher And Charles Bakkie'S Petition To Perpetuate Testimony Of David Bakkie By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Christopher Andreas for petitioner and moving party: Christopher Bakkie
Christina Helwig for defendant and opposing party: Eaton Electrical Inc.
Robert Miller for defendant and opposing party: Ericsson, Inc.
Nicole E. Gage for defendant and opposing party: Rockwell Alternation

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification: Petitioner Christopher Bakkie's petition to perpetuate testimony by videotaped deposition is granted on condition that counsel for petitioner provide or make available the materials specified in the opposition of Eaton Electrical Inc. by January 22, 2007. The deposition may commence after January 31, 2007.

MODIFICATION: That plaintiff is to provide materials specified in exhibit B by January 10, 2007
